title: COI Mod config schema
description: This format allow direct write of configuration fields for mod settings.

propertyNames.description: Configuration fields must be writen in 'snake_case' format

oneOf.description: Configure a boolean value that displays as checkbox, ideal for enabling of specific features

default.description:
Default value of this configuration field

Supported types: bool, string, integer, float
For numeric types must be defined: "is_integer"

description.description: Describe shortly what this field configures

oneOf.description: Configure a text value, ideal for custom display names of entities, recipe names, ...

default.description:
Default value of this configuration field

Supported types: bool, string, integer, float
For numeric types must be defined: "is_integer"

description.description: Describe shortly what this field configures

regex.description: Regular expression that the text must fullfill

oneOf.description: Configure a full number value, ideal for editing of production numbers of recipes or bonuses

default.description:
Default value of this configuration field

Supported types: bool, string, integer, float
For numeric types must be defined: "is_integer"

description.description: Describe shortly what this field configures

is_integer.description: Must be set to true for integer fields, must be set to false for float fields

oneOf.description: Configure a floating number value, ideal for editing bonuses, maintenance values

default.description:
Default value of this configuration field

Supported types: bool, string, integer, float
For numeric types must be defined: "is_integer"

description.description: Describe shortly what this field configures

is_integer.description: Must be set to true for integer fields, must be set to false for float fields
